title: Critical fixes and non-blocking integration for extracted Renode SX1262.cs
description: Implement 3 critical fixes for the standalone/extracted SX1262.cs peripheral used with Renode: 1. SimHost property and mutable simHost. 2. Fix 0x17->0x12 opcode comment in header/README. 3. Integrate non-blocking background readerThread, locks (stateLock,connectionLock,writeLock), rxOneShot, latchedIrqFlags from LICHEN version (lichen/boards/renode/peripherals/SX1262.cs) into extraction version, preserving loopbackMode. Protect all state changes with locks. Update EnterRxModeBridge, Reset, FinishTransmission, Transmit, OnGPIO, GetStatus to use locks. Integrate loopback with one-shot RX. Test with test.resc + Renode. Update extraction README. Verify compilation. Prepare for commit. No dead code, follow C# style. File as epic with child tasks. See project-LICHEN-ddcu for extraction context.
close_reason: Critical fixes implemented, non-blocking integrated preserving loopback, tested, compiles, README updated. No dead code.
